description: Create a 3D bent wire model in FreeCAD where the wire centerline passes through coordinates (0, 0, 0), (0, 100, 0), (100, 100, 50), and (100, 0, 50) in sequence. Apply 20 mm radius fillets at the intermediate corners. The model must feature a circular cross-section with a 6 mm diameter as a single solid object. Save the document to /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/seat_frame_wire.FCStd.
